testcase.name: test_admin_payments
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p2_features.py:119: in test_admin_payments assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_leads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p2_features.py:129: in test_admin_leads assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
